tools.name: geocode
tools.description: Convert a US street address into latitude/longitude coordinates (US Census geocoder). Use this first when you have an address but need coordinates for the weather/elevation tools. US addresses only.

tools.name: weather_forecast
tools.description: Get a multi-day weather forecast for a US location by latitude/longitude (National Weather Service). Returns named periods (Today, Tonight, ...) with temperature, wind, and a short + detailed forecast. Use geocode first if you only have an address.

tools.name: weather_current
tools.description: Get the latest observed weather conditions for a US location by latitude/longitude, from the nearest NWS observation station: temperature, humidity, wind, and text description.

tools.name: weather_alerts
tools.description: List active NWS weather alerts (warnings, watches, advisories) for a US state or marine area. Pass a two-letter state code like CA, TX, FL. Returns event type, severity, headline, affected area and expiry.

tools.name: earthquakes
tools.description: List recent earthquakes worldwide from the USGS feed. Filter by minimum magnitude, look-back window in days, and optionally a bounding box or a point+radius (km). Returns magnitude, place, time, depth and coordinates.

tools.name: elevation
tools.description: Get the ground elevation at a latitude/longitude within the US, from the USGS Elevation Point Query Service. Returns elevation in feet and meters.
